notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep making villagers nonstop.
Scout for sheep, gold, and your opponent.
Put 3 villagers on wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build your first Imperial Official and set it to collect taxes from your Town Center.
Keep most villagers on food and add a Mill on berries.
Keep Officials supervising drop-off buildings — the tax gold funds your whole game, so don't let it float.
Send 3 villagers to gold with a Mining Camp.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, age up — the Barbican of the Sun gives a strong defensive tower; the Imperial Academy is the economic pick.
Keep gathering through the age-up; reaching Feudal starts the Song Dynasty.
Protect your Officials — losing them cuts your tax income.
In Feudal (Song Dynasty), make Zhuge Nu (repeating crossbows) and Spearmen for a safe defensive army.
Reinvest tax gold into more villagers — Chinese want a bigger economy than the enemy.
Defend with your compact army while villagers and tax gold pile up.
Add more Imperial Officials so every drop-off building is supervised.
Bank toward Castle Age and the next Dynasty for a power spike.
Keep your buildings tight and defended — Chinese are strong holding ground.
In Castle Age, add Palace Guard and a Nest of Bees (siege) behind your crossbows.
Use your larger economy to out-produce the enemy and grind forward with siege.
